## Tags
twins, duality, communication, air, adaptability, astrology, star sign, horoscope, constellation, celestial

## Categories
social, emoji

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/zodiac-gemini)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ZodiacGemini;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ZodiacGemini { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
